title: Azifa Stuffed Spinach Wontons with Malty Sauce
description: A fusion of Ethiopian and Asian flavors in this crispy wonton dish filled with spinach and azifa, served with a malty sauce.
instructions: 1. Mix chopped spinach and crumbed azifa in a bowl.
2. Lay a wonton wrapper on a flat surface. Place a tablespoon of the spinach-azifa mixture in the center.
3. Brush the edges of the wrapper with water. Fold the wrapper into a triangle, pressing the edges to seal.
4. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
5. Heat about 1/4 inch of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. Fry the wontons in batches until crispy and golden brown. Drain on paper towels.
7. Serve the wontons with malty sauce, which can be made by reducing 1 cup of malty grains in a saucepan with 1 cup of water until thickened.
